messages.meaning: Hydraulic system pressure below normal. Pump failure or fluid loss.
messages.immediate: HYD HAND PUMP OPERATE (30–40 strokes to 1500 psi). If pressure rises: pump failed — check CB. Maintain 1500 psi with flaps extended.

messages.meaning: HYD OIL PUMP circuit breaker open.
messages.immediate: Do not reset CB in flight. Use hand pump.
